feed.title: CT
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Cloud Resume Challenge
entry.summary:
Introduction
Coming from a Software Dev background, I have always been interested in the mysterious Cloud, and wanted to learn more of the inner workings, but had no idea where to start. It was not until a good friend of mine, Dakota Riley, gifted me Forrest Brazeal’s Cloud Resume Challenge book, where I finally took the dive, put my head down, and immersed myself.
Preparation I read Forrest ...
